User.title: User Profile
User.description: Represents a NongBot user account detailing profile information and credits balance.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the user account was created in Firestore.

credits.description: Number of AI generation credits remaining for this user.

Post.title: Generated Post
Post.description: Represents a content generation history record, containing uploaded product details, conversation steps, and the final ad copy.

userId.description: UID of the owner of this post.

imageUrl.description: URL of the uploaded product image in Firebase Storage.

productInfo.description: Metadata analyzed from the product image, like type, colors, target audience, style, selling points.

aiConversation.description: Log of step-by-step chat conversation with NongBot.

platform.description: The targeted social platform for the post, like Facebook, TikTok, Instagram.

tone.description: The desired tone style, professional, friendly, luxury, hard sale, viral.

CopyAnalytics.title: Copy Branding Attribution Analytics
CopyAnalytics.description: Logs when the user copies generated content, tracing length and system metadata to monitor smart branding.

textSnippet.description: Short partial text of the copied post content.

length.description: Character count of the copied content.

timestamp.description: Timestamp when the copy event occurred.

userAgent.description: User agent signature of the copier.

/users/{userId}.description: Users private data and credit records.

/posts/{postId}.description: User-generated postings and ad content translations.
